title: Price, Richard - Director General for the Performance, Strategy and Analysis Group, Ministry of Justice  - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Price left his role at the Ministry of Justice in April 2025.  Director, Fingleton Limited  Mr Price sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Fingleton Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025; and the appointment was taken up in September 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
